name: Suncorp Group Limited
analysis: SUN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$18.8650. Trade idea: entry A$18.9400, stop A$17.9388, target A$21.9436 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
